title: Identification of pests / diseases on vegetables with the help of smart applications
subtitle: Prepoznavanje škodljivcev/bolezni na zelenjadnicah s pomočjo pametnih aplikacij
description: A guide presenting smartphone applications for identifying pests, diseases, and weeds in vegetable production. It highlights the CampoGest app’s role in selecting appropriate plant protection products and beneficial organisms, indicating effective dosages, and enhancing communication between advisors and farmers within an IPM framework.
